item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Bard's Journey I
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's path to becoming a realm-renowned bard─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level bard to 60 and complete all job quests up through “The Ballad of Oblivion.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
